ddls:
CREATE TABLE "decision_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision tree */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the decision tree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decision tree */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the decision tree was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the decision tree was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the decision tree (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decision tree the node belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., decision, outcome) */,
  "decision_options" TEXT /* JSON string containing possible decision options for the node */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the node (e.g., clinical notes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES decision_trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decision tree the edge belongs to */,
  "from_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the edge starts from */,
  "to_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the edge ends at */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the edge */,
  "outcome" REAL /* Outcome value of the edge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the edge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the edge was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the edge */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the edge (e.g., clinical notes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES decision_trees ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_from_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_to_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "insurance_info" TEXT /* Insurance information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment option */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the option belongs to */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decision tree used to determine the option */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the option was determined from */,
  "outcome" REAL /* Outcome value of the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment option was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment option was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment option ended */,
  "prescribing_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who prescribed the treatment option */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the treatment option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_options_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_options_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES decision_trees ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_options_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment option the result belongs to */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the treatment option */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics result was last updated */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analytics */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data or notes related to the analytics result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES treatment_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decision tree the collaboration is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration was last updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES decision_trees ("tree_id")
)
